title: Autonomous Governance in Multi-Agent Systems
summary: A comprehensive framework for defining and enforcing constitutional constraints in autonomous agent swarms.

key_claims.claim: Static policy analysis can prevent 90% of unintended agent escalations.

methods.name: Constitutional Static Checker
methods.description: Formal verification of agent plans against a set of invariant rules.

limitations: Formal verification is computationally expensive for complex plans.

suggested_followups.description: Adopt static checking for TARS agent plans.
suggested_followups.rationale: Directly applicable to Demerzel's mission of governance.

issue_draft.title: [Demerzel] Implement Static Plan Verification
issue_draft.body:
Integrate the formal verification methods from Charlie Brown's thesis to improve safety.

- [ ] Define plan grammar for verification
- [ ] Implement invariant checker
- [ ] Add to TARS pre-execution hook
